name: Hyacinth Macaw
conservationEfforts: Instituto Arara Azul nest box program in the Pantanal. Community engagement protects nesting trees. Population stabilized through anti-poaching enforcement and habitat management.
description: The world's largest parrot at 1 meter long, with brilliant cobalt-blue plumage. Their powerful beak can crack palm nuts that no other bird can open. They mate for life.
